chapter_title.en: Stories of people with long lifespans from Arabs and non-Arabs are famous and chronicled in books and history.

parts.text: النبي صلى الله عليه وآله وسلم أنه قال

text: : رفعت إلى النار فرأيت عمرو بن لحي رجلا قصيرا أحمر أزرق يجر قصبة في النار. فقلت: من هذا؟قيل: عمرو بن لحي.

en.sayyid-athar-husain-s-h-rizvi: H 88 - It is narrated from the Messenger of Allah (s) that he said: I was shown Hell during my journey of Meraj. I saw a short stature man, Amr bin Lahih paying with his baton in Hell. I asked: Who is this? I was told: He is Amr bin Lahih.
